extDescription.message: Save Tencent CoDesign prototype links and access passwords. Automatically applies credentials when opening shared previews. Paste share text to import in one click.

optionsHeaderDesc.message: Manage CoDesign prototype share links and auto-apply access passwords—no more typing them every time.

emptyDesc.message: Click "Add Prototype" and paste a CoDesign share message to import quickly.

footerNote.message: Data is stored in Chrome sync storage and used only for codesign.qq.com. Nothing is sent to third-party servers.

quickPasteHint.message: Paste a CoDesign share message to auto-fill name, link, and password.

pastePlaceholder.message:
[CoDesign Share] Product Homepage v1
https://codesign.qq.com/s/123456789012345
Password: XXXX

parseFailed.message: Could not parse share content. Please check the link format.

parseNeedPassword.message: Link recognized. Please enter the access password.

alertIncomplete.message: Please fill in name, link, and password, or paste a share message in Quick Paste.

alertInvalidUrl.message: Invalid link. Use a codesign.qq.com /s/ or /app/s/ share URL.

alertDuplicate.message: This prototype link already exists. Edit the existing entry instead.

popupEmptyDesc.message: Add CoDesign share links to open them from here.
